docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,380.00 FILED BY GIALLORENZO, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, JULIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, JULIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUSTIN GIALLORENZO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIA FRANK IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1831 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-19 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
